title: Narada
description: Built a **7-step agentic AI search pipeline** in Python/FastAPI that takes any topic query, concurrently scrapes the web, runs **LLM extraction** to produce structured entity tables, and returns results with **per-cell source traceability** — every value links to its origin URL, enforced at the data model level. Designed a **provider abstraction layer** supporting **4 LLM providers** (Groq, Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic) and **3 search providers** (Tavily, Brave, DuckDuckGo), all hot-swappable via env config with **per-step multi-model configuration** so each stage of the **AI agent** pipeline can run on a different model for cost/quality tradeoffs. Deployed with a **zero-server-side-secret** architecture: users supply their own API keys via browser sessionStorage, keys travel as request headers and are discarded per-request, with CSP headers blocking XSS.

title: Deepfake Deconstruction
description: Designed a modular deep-learning pipeline to **reverse-engineer face-swap deepfakes**, identifying the original source image with **85%+ accuracy** on a custom dataset of 10,000+ manipulated images. Implemented convolutional architectures with feature extraction layers, enabling **component-level model swapping** for improved scalability. Addressed a **real-world AI safety problem** by going beyond detection to trace the origins of manipulation.

title: DKeeper
description: Built a decentralized note-taking app with **Google Keep–style UI** using React and state hooks, allowing users to create, delete, and persist notes on the ICP blockchain. Integrated secure, tamper-proof storage leveraging blockchain smart contracts, ensuring **100% data immutability**. Applied **frontend best practices:** responsive design, accessibility compliance, and component-based architecture.

title: File Hosting Service
description: Built a file hosting service with **user authentication**, enabling secure access to individual files. Implemented a **unique ID system** stored in **MongoDB**, associating each file with its user for efficient retrieval. Developed **server-side storage** for uploaded files with **REST API** routes to upload, list, and download files.
